mapper.select: /* LegalRpstMapper.getTrgtList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A ,(SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE B.USER_SSN IS NOT NULL) B WHERE A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND DECODE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN), '-', ''),7,1),'1', '19','2','19','20') || SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN), '-', ''),1,6) <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), - 19 * 12),'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.update: /* LegalRpstMapper.updateMspRequestDtl */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DTL SET CSTMR_TYPE = 'NA' ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_REL_NM = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL = '' ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* LegalRpstMapper.updateMspRequestAgent */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_AGENT SET MINOR_AGENT_NAME = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION = '' WHERE REQUEST_KEY IN (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )

/* LegalRpstMapper.updateMcpRequestAgent */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP SET MINOR_AGENT_NAME = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN = '' ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION = '' WHERE REQUEST_KEY IN (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )
mapper.select: /* LegalRpstMapper.getTrgtUserList */ SELECT A.USERID FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE BIRTHDAY <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), - 19 * 12),'YYYYMMDD') AND REVOCATION_DATE IS NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MCP_USER_AGENT@DL_MCP B WHERE B.USERID = A.USERID) > 0
